--- a/explore_data.py
+++ b/explore_data.py
@@ -0,0 +1,20 @@
+import pandas as pd

+import numpy as np

+

+train = pd.read_csv('/data/train.csv')

+val = pd.read_csv('/data/val.csv')

+

+print(f'Train shape: {train.shape}')

+print(f'Val shape: {val.shape}')

+print(f'Train columns: {train.columns.tolist()}')

+print(f'Train target stats: mean={train["target"].mean():.4f}, std={train["target"].std():.4f}, min={train["target"].min():.4f}, max={train["target"].max():.4f}')

+print(f'Val target stats: mean={val["target"].mean():.4f}, std={val["target"].std():.4f}')

+print(f'Sequence length: {train["sequence"].str.len().unique()}')

+print(f'First sequence (first 50 chars): {train["sequence"].iloc[0][:50]}')

+

+# Check mutation region

+ref = train['sequence'].iloc[0]

+for i, row in train.head(20).iterrows():

+    seq = row['sequence']

+    diffs = [j for j in range(len(seq)) if seq[j] != ref[j]]

+    print(f'Row {i}: {len(diffs)} mutations at positions {diffs}, target={row["target"]:.4f}')

--- a/extract_embeddings.py
+++ b/extract_embeddings.py
@@ -0,0 +1,79 @@
+"""Extract ESM2 embeddings for all sequences and save to disk."""

+import torch

+import esm

+import pandas as pd

+import numpy as np

+from tqdm import tqdm

+import os

+import time

+

+def extract_embeddings(model_name, csv_path, output_path, batch_size=8):

+    print(f'Loading {model_name}...')

+    if model_name == 'esm2_t6_8M_UR50D':

+        model, alphabet = esm.pretrained.esm2_t6_8M_UR50D()

+        num_layers = 6

+        embed_dim = 320

+    elif model_name == 'esm2_t12_35M_UR50D':

+        model, alphabet = esm.pretrained.esm2_t12_35M_UR50D()

+        num_layers = 12

+        embed_dim = 480

+    elif model_name == 'esm2_t30_150M_UR50D':

+        model, alphabet = esm.pretrained.esm2_t30_150M_UR50D()

+        num_layers = 30

+        embed_dim = 640

+    

+    batch_converter = alphabet.get_batch_converter()

+    model = model.cuda().eval()

+    

+    df = pd.read_csv(csv_path)

+    sequences = df['sequence'].tolist()

+    

+    global_embs = []

+    mut_embs = []

+    

+    start = time.time()

+    for i in tqdm(range(0, len(sequences), batch_size)):

+        batch_seqs = sequences[i:i+batch_size]

+        data = [(f'seq_{j}', s) for j, s in enumerate(batch_seqs)]

+        _, _, tokens = batch_converter(data)

+        tokens = tokens.cuda()

+        

+        with torch.no_grad():

+            results = model(tokens, repr_layers=[num_layers], return_contacts=False)

+        

+        token_reps = results['representations'][num_layers]  # (B, L, D)

+        

+        # Global mean (exclude special tokens)

+        mask = (tokens != alphabet.padding_idx) & (tokens != alphabet.cls_idx) & (tokens != alphabet.eos_idx)

+        mask_expanded = mask.unsqueeze(-1)

+        global_rep = (token_reps * mask_expanded).sum(dim=1) / mask_expanded.sum(dim=1)

+        

+        # Mutation region

+        mut_start = 562

+        mut_end = 589

+        mut_rep = token_reps[:, mut_start:mut_end+1, :].mean(dim=1)

+        

+        global_embs.append(global_rep.cpu().numpy())

+        mut_embs.append(mut_rep.cpu().numpy())

+        

+        if i == 0:

+            elapsed = time.time() - start

+            total_est = elapsed * (len(sequences) / batch_size)

+            print(f'First batch took {elapsed:.1f}s, estimated total: {total_est:.0f}s')

+    

+    global_embs = np.concatenate(global_embs, axis=0)

+    mut_embs = np.concatenate(mut_embs, axis=0)

+    

+    np.savez(output_path, global_embs=global_embs, mut_embs=mut_embs)

+    print(f'Saved embeddings to {output_path}: global={global_embs.shape}, mut={mut_embs.shape}')

+    print(f'Total time: {time.time()-start:.1f}s')

+

+if __name__ == '__main__':

+    import sys

+    model_name = sys.argv[1] if len(sys.argv) > 1 else 'esm2_t6_8M_UR50D'

+    bs = int(sys.argv[2]) if len(sys.argv) > 2 else 8

+    

+    os.makedirs('embeddings', exist_ok=True)

+    

+    extract_embeddings(model_name, '/data/train.csv', f'embeddings/train_{model_name}.npz', batch_size=bs)

+    extract_embeddings(model_name, '/data/val.csv', f'embeddings/val_{model_name}.npz', batch_size=bs)

--- a/model.py
+++ b/model.py
@@ -0,0 +1,79 @@
+import torch

+import torch.nn as nn

+import esm

+

+class ESMFitnessModel(nn.Module):

+    def __init__(self, esm_model_name='esm2_t6_8M_UR50D', freeze_esm=True, hidden_dim=256):

+        super().__init__()

+        if esm_model_name == 'esm2_t6_8M_UR50D':

+            self.esm_model, self.alphabet = esm.pretrained.esm2_t6_8M_UR50D()

+            self.embed_dim = 320

+            self.num_layers = 6

+        elif esm_model_name == 'esm2_t12_35M_UR50D':

+            self.esm_model, self.alphabet = esm.pretrained.esm2_t12_35M_UR50D()

+            self.embed_dim = 480

+            self.num_layers = 12

+        elif esm_model_name == 'esm2_t30_150M_UR50D':

+            self.esm_model, self.alphabet = esm.pretrained.esm2_t30_150M_UR50D()

+            self.embed_dim = 640

+            self.num_layers = 30

+        

+        self.batch_converter = self.alphabet.get_batch_converter()

+        

+        if freeze_esm:

+            for param in self.esm_model.parameters():

+                param.requires_grad = False

+        

+        # Regression head using mutation region embeddings + global

+        # mutation region: positions 561-588 (28 AAs)

+        # In ESM tokens: +1 for BOS token, so positions 562-589

+        self.head = nn.Sequential(

+            nn.Linear(self.embed_dim * 2, hidden_dim),

+            nn.ReLU(),

+            nn.Dropout(0.1),

+            nn.Linear(hidden_dim, hidden_dim),

+            nn.ReLU(),

+            nn.Dropout(0.1),

+            nn.Linear(hidden_dim, 1)

+        )

+    

+    def forward(self, tokens):

+        with torch.no_grad() if not any(p.requires_grad for p in self.esm_model.parameters()) else torch.enable_grad():

+            results = self.esm_model(tokens, repr_layers=[self.num_layers], return_contacts=False)

+        

+        # Get last layer representations

+        token_reps = results['representations'][self.num_layers]  # (B, L, D)

+        

+        # Global mean (exclude BOS and EOS)

+        # tokens shape: (B, L) where L includes BOS + seq + EOS

+        mask = (tokens != self.alphabet.padding_idx) & (tokens != self.alphabet.cls_idx) & (tokens != self.alphabet.eos_idx)

+        mask = mask.unsqueeze(-1)  # (B, L, 1)

+        global_rep = (token_reps * mask).sum(dim=1) / mask.sum(dim=1)  # (B, D)

+        

+        # Mutation region: positions 561-588 in sequence = tokens 562-589 (1-indexed with BOS)

+        mut_start = 562  # 561 + 1 for BOS

+        mut_end = 589    # 588 + 1 for BOS

+        mut_rep = token_reps[:, mut_start:mut_end+1, :].mean(dim=1)  # (B, D)

+        

+        # Concatenate

+        combined = torch.cat([global_rep, mut_rep], dim=-1)  # (B, 2*D)

+        

+        return self.head(combined).squeeze(-1)

+

+

+class SimpleRegressionHead(nn.Module):

+    """Standalone regression head for pre-extracted embeddings."""

+    def __init__(self, input_dim, hidden_dim=256):

+        super().__init__()

+        self.head = nn.Sequential(

+            nn.Linear(input_dim, hidden_dim),

+            nn.ReLU(),

+            nn.Dropout(0.1),

+            nn.Linear(hidden_dim, hidden_dim),

+            nn.ReLU(),

+            nn.Dropout(0.1),

+            nn.Linear(hidden_dim, 1)

+        )

+    

+    def forward(self, x):

+        return self.head(x).squeeze(-1)

--- a/predict.py
+++ b/predict.py
@@ -0,0 +1,77 @@
+import torch

+import numpy as np

+import pandas as pd

+import json

+import argparse

+import esm

+from tqdm import tqdm

+from model import SimpleRegressionHead

+

+def main():

+    parser = argparse.ArgumentParser()

+    parser.add_argument('--data_path', required=True)

+    parser.add_argument('--checkpoint', required=True)

+    parser.add_argument('--output', required=True)

+    args = parser.parse_args()

+    

+    # Load checkpoint

+    ckpt = torch.load(args.checkpoint, map_location='cpu')

+    model_name = ckpt['model_name']

+    input_dim = ckpt['input_dim']

+    hidden_dim = ckpt['hidden_dim']

+    

+    # Load regression head

+    reg_model = SimpleRegressionHead(input_dim, hidden_dim).cuda()

+    reg_model.load_state_dict(ckpt['model_state_dict'])

+    reg_model.eval()

+    

+    # Load ESM model

+    if model_name == 'esm2_t6_8M_UR50D':

+        esm_model, alphabet = esm.pretrained.esm2_t6_8M_UR50D()

+        num_layers = 6

+    elif model_name == 'esm2_t12_35M_UR50D':

+        esm_model, alphabet = esm.pretrained.esm2_t12_35M_UR50D()

+        num_layers = 12

+    elif model_name == 'esm2_t30_150M_UR50D':

+        esm_model, alphabet = esm.pretrained.esm2_t30_150M_UR50D()

+        num_layers = 30

+    

+    batch_converter = alphabet.get_batch_converter()

+    esm_model = esm_model.cuda().eval()

+    

+    # Load test data

+    test_df = pd.read_csv(f'{args.data_path}/test.csv')

+    sequences = test_df['sequence'].tolist()

+    

+    predictions = []

+    batch_size = 8

+    

+    for i in tqdm(range(0, len(sequences), batch_size)):

+        batch_seqs = sequences[i:i+batch_size]

+        data = [(f'seq_{j}', s) for j, s in enumerate(batch_seqs)]

+        _, _, tokens = batch_converter(data)

+        tokens = tokens.cuda()

+        

+        with torch.no_grad():

+            results = esm_model(tokens, repr_layers=[num_layers], return_contacts=False)

+            token_reps = results['representations'][num_layers]

+            

+            mask = (tokens != alphabet.padding_idx) & (tokens != alphabet.cls_idx) & (tokens != alphabet.eos_idx)

+            mask_expanded = mask.unsqueeze(-1)

+            global_rep = (token_reps * mask_expanded).sum(dim=1) / mask_expanded.sum(dim=1)

+            

+            mut_start = 562

+            mut_end = 589

+            mut_rep = token_reps[:, mut_start:mut_end+1, :].mean(dim=1)

+            

+            combined = torch.cat([global_rep, mut_rep], dim=-1)

+            pred = reg_model(combined)

+            predictions.extend(pred.cpu().numpy().tolist())

+    

+    output = {'predictions': predictions}

+    with open(args.output, 'w') as f:

+        json.dump(output, f)

+    print(f'Saved {len(predictions)} predictions to {args.output}')

+

+if __name__ == '__main__':

+    main()

--- a/train.py
+++ b/train.py
@@ -0,0 +1,108 @@
+import torch

+import torch.nn as nn

+import numpy as np

+import pandas as pd

+from torch.utils.data import DataLoader, TensorDataset

+from scipy.stats import spearmanr

+import os

+import json

+import time

+import logging

+

+logging.basicConfig(level=logging.WARNING)

+

+def main():

+    import argparse

+    parser = argparse.ArgumentParser()

+    parser.add_argument('--model_name', default='esm2_t6_8M_UR50D')

+    parser.add_argument('--epochs', type=int, default=50)

+    parser.add_argument('--lr', type=float, default=1e-3)

+    parser.add_argument('--hidden_dim', type=int, default=256)

+    parser.add_argument('--batch_size', type=int, default=256)

+    parser.add_argument('--weight_decay', type=float, default=1e-4)

+    args = parser.parse_args()

+    

+    iteration = os.environ.get('RAB_ITERATION', '0')

+    log_dir = f'logs/iter_{iteration}'

+    os.makedirs(log_dir, exist_ok=True)

+    log_file = os.path.join(log_dir, 'metrics.jsonl')

+    

+    # Load embeddings

+    train_data = np.load(f'embeddings/train_{args.model_name}.npz')

+    val_data = np.load(f'embeddings/val_{args.model_name}.npz')

+    

+    train_global = torch.tensor(train_data['global_embs'], dtype=torch.float32)

+    train_mut = torch.tensor(train_data['mut_embs'], dtype=torch.float32)

+    train_X = torch.cat([train_global, train_mut], dim=-1)

+    

+    val_global = torch.tensor(val_data['global_embs'], dtype=torch.float32)

+    val_mut = torch.tensor(val_data['mut_embs'], dtype=torch.float32)

+    val_X = torch.cat([val_global, val_mut], dim=-1)

+    

+    train_df = pd.read_csv('/data/train.csv')

+    val_df = pd.read_csv('/data/val.csv')

+    train_y = torch.tensor(train_df['target'].values, dtype=torch.float32)

+    val_y = torch.tensor(val_df['target'].values, dtype=torch.float32)

+    

+    input_dim = train_X.shape[1]

+    print(f'Input dim: {input_dim}, Train: {len(train_X)}, Val: {len(val_X)}')

+    

+    # Model

+    from model import SimpleRegressionHead

+    model = SimpleRegressionHead(input_dim, args.hidden_dim).cuda()

+    

+    optimizer = torch.optim.AdamW(model.parameters(), lr=args.lr, weight_decay=args.weight_decay)

+    scheduler = torch.optim.lr_scheduler.CosineAnnealingLR(optimizer, T_max=args.epochs)

+    criterion = nn.MSELoss()

+    

+    train_dataset = TensorDataset(train_X, train_y)

+    train_loader = DataLoader(train_dataset, batch_size=args.batch_size, shuffle=True, num_workers=0)

+    

+    best_spearman = -1

+    os.makedirs('checkpoints', exist_ok=True)

+    

+    for epoch in range(args.epochs):

+        model.train()

+        total_loss = 0

+        for X_batch, y_batch in train_loader:

+            X_batch, y_batch = X_batch.cuda(), y_batch.cuda()

+            pred = model(X_batch)

+            loss = criterion(pred, y_batch)

+            optimizer.zero_grad()

+            loss.backward()

+            optimizer.step()

+            total_loss += loss.item() * len(X_batch)

+        

+        train_loss = total_loss / len(train_X)

+        scheduler.step()

+        

+        # Validation

+        model.eval()

+        with torch.no_grad():

+            val_pred = model(val_X.cuda()).cpu().numpy()

+        val_targets = val_y.numpy()

+        val_loss = np.mean((val_pred - val_targets)**2)

+        sp = spearmanr(val_targets, val_pred).correlation

+        

+        # Log metrics

+        with open(log_file, 'a') as f:

+            f.write(json.dumps({'step': epoch, 'train_loss': train_loss, 'val_loss': float(val_loss), 'val_spearman': float(sp)}) + '\n')

+        

+        if sp > best_spearman:

+            best_spearman = sp

+            torch.save({

+                'model_state_dict': model.state_dict(),

+                'input_dim': input_dim,

+                'hidden_dim': args.hidden_dim,

+                'model_name': args.model_name,

+                'epoch': epoch,

+                'spearman': sp

+            }, 'checkpoints/best.pt')

+        

+        if epoch % 10 == 0 or epoch == args.epochs - 1:

+            print(f'Epoch {epoch}: train_loss={train_loss:.6f}, val_loss={val_loss:.6f}, spearman={sp:.4f}, best={best_spearman:.4f}')

+    

+    print(f'Best validation Spearman: {best_spearman:.4f}')

+

+if __name__ == '__main__':

+    main()
